title: nilgirianthus wightianus
intro: Nilgirianthus wightianus, also known as Wight's Nilgiri or Nilgiri, is a flowering plant species in the family Tiliaceae. It is native to the Western Ghats in India, where it is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial activities. The health benefits of Nilgirianthus wightianus include its ability to reduce fever, relieve digestive issues, and alleviate respiratory problems, making it a valuable herb in Ayurvedic medicine. Herbal preparations of Nilgirianthus wightianus include infusions, decoctions, and powders, which can be used to treat various health conditions.
